idea-plugin.name: Veld
idea-plugin.description:
Professional Veld contract language support for all JetBrains IDEs.

Features:

  • Full syntax highlighting for .veld files
  • Context-aware code completion (models, enums, types, HTTP methods, directives)
  • Real-time validation and error highlighting
  • Go-to-definition for types and imports (Ctrl+Click)
  • Find references across files
  • Import resolution with @models/ and @modules/ paths
  • Brace matching and auto-closing
  • Code style settings
  • File templates for models, modules, and enums
  • Veld CLI integration (validate, generate)

Veld is a contract-first API development tool that generates type-safe backends and frontends from simple schema files.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.6.0

  • Compatibility update: now supports IntelliJ IDEA / GoLand / CLion 2026.1 (build 261)
  • Raised minimum supported version to IntelliJ 2024.1 (build 241)

0.5.0

  • Distinct colors for model/module/enum/action/import/extends keywords
  • Full PSI tree: model, enum, module, action, field, import statement nodes
  • Structure view: see models, enums, modules with fields and actions in the Structure tool window
  • Improved go-to-definition using PSI tree (Ctrl+Click on type names)
  • @alias/name recognized in type positions (after colon and extends)
  • New File action: right-click -> New -> Veld File (Model, Module, Enum)
  • Enum declarations use INTERFACE_NAME color (distinct from model CLASS_NAME)
  • Annotations use METADATA color for better distinction

0.4.0

  • Fixed Go-to-Definition: more robust leaf traversal (no longer relies on strict token type matching)
  • Fixed Annotation color: @default/@required now visually distinct from type references
  • Added @annotation code completion in field definitions (@default, @required, @min, @max, @minLength, @maxLength, @regex, @unique, @deprecated)
  • Annotation completions place cursor inside parentheses automatically

0.3.0

  • Fixed Go-to-Definition: Ctrl+Click / Ctrl+B now reliably navigates to type declarations
  • Fixed import path color (was string green, now distinct metadata color)
  • Fixed URL path color (was string green, now distinct)
  • Added enum value semantic highlighting (distinct constant color)
  • Added @annotation highlighting (e.g. @default(user) on fields)
  • Added :param highlighting in path directives
  • Fixed false validation errors for @default annotations on fields
  • Added query: and middleware: directive completion and type-checking
  • Improved model hover documentation with field table
  • Added block-context-aware annotator (correct enum vs model body detection)

0.2.0

  • Go-to-definition for types and import paths
  • Real-time in-editor validation (no CLI required)
  • Context-aware completions with imported models/enums
  • Import path autocompletion from filesystem
  • Fixed path literal highlighting (/ no longer marked as error)
  • Cross-file type resolution

0.1.0 - Initial Release

  • Syntax highlighting for all Veld constructs
  • File type association for .veld files
  • Code completion for built-in types
  • Quick actions for validate and generate

action.description: Run veld validate on the current project
Run veld generate to create backend/frontend code
Preview what veld generate would create
Create a new Veld contract file
